narrative:
Girard municipal court district has 26,710 registered voters, with 55.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 11.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 33.6%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 22.3 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +6.8% D−R vs +29.0% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
